---
title: "Accessibility statement"
subtitle: |
  The University of Oxford is committed to providing an accessible web presence
  that gives members of the public and members of the University community full
  access to University information, courses and activities offered publicly
  through the website.

format:
  html:
    toc: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

Holding page for an accessibility statement.

<!-- do not remove: always include the footer content -->
:::{.footer-block}
{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}
:::
